creator: watanabe@komadori.planet.kobe-u.ac.jp
text:
The default archie host "archie.sura.net" has no DNS entry.

Fix: 

Since we can change the default archie host by the environment variable
ARCHIE_HOST, this is not so critical problem.  However, if "archie.sura.net"
has really disappeared, we should change the default archie host, I think.
How-To-Repeat: 
  I don't know whether this is a temporary problem of sura.net.
